title: microlepia polyantha
intro: Microlepia polyantha, also known as the rhino horn fern, is a type of perennial fern native to Southeast Asia. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to prevent and treat various health issues. The health benefits of Microlepia polyantha include its ability to alleviate fever, improve digestion, and support the immune system, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, Microlepia polyantha is often used in traditional tea infusions, tinctures, and extracts, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional due to potential side effects.
